text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Phew! I'm beat! I think this old body's had enough
for today.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: You know what I mean. It was tough.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I've come this far. Surely I can put up a good
fight... or maybe not.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nice Nature is most likely caught up in thinking
about the fast-approaching Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
You said it! You have to take responsibility if it
doesn't pay off!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I better start looking into what kind of fancy meal
you can treat me to when that happens. I'm
thinking hot pot or pufferfish.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And with that, Nice Nature's productive summer
camp comes to an end.
